proposed_base_material_variables.crystal_structure: The specific crystallographic lattice structure or distinct phases present in the base material (e.g., single FCC, duplex FCC-BCC, ordered BCC), which inherently influence selective dissolution and localized corrosion susceptibility.

proposed_conditioned_material_variables.exposed_surface_area: The precise geometric area of the working electrode actively exposed to the testing electrolyte, which is required to correctly convert raw measured currents into current densities.

proposed_experiment_variables.open_circuit_stabilization_time: The specific duration the specimen is immersed in the electrolyte at open circuit potential (OCP) to reach a quasi-steady-state before the potentiodynamic polarization scan begins.
proposed_experiment_variables.cathodic_pre_conditioning: The applied negative potential and its corresponding duration used in-situ immediately prior to the test to strip native air-formed oxides and standardize the initial surface state.
proposed_experiment_variables.counter_electrode: The specific material and configuration of the auxiliary electrode (e.g., Platinum) used to complete the electrical circuit in the multi-electrode cell setup.
